input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.2.3
            TITLE: penalties for late submission of all or any one of the design documents will be imposed as

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.2.3: Penalties for Late Submission of all or any one of the Design Documents will be imposed as
S.4.2.3 Penalties for Late Submission of all or any one of the Design Documents will be imposed as 
given in section DR - Document Requirements

final_answer: S.4.2.3 Penalties for Late Submission of all or any one of the Design Documents will be imposed as given in section DR - Document Requirements
